name: Marrla Table Lamp W/ USB Port - 23.25 Inch Height - TBL4424 - Cream - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the Marrla 23.5 inch cream resin table lamp. This lamp is more than just a light source; it is a stylish addition to any room. Its elegant cream hue complements a variety of decors, offering versatility and charm. Crafted from resin, the Marrla table lamp boasts a sleek and polished finish. 

One of its standout features is the integrated USB port, providing a convenient solution for charging your devices while keeping your space clutter free. Whether this is placed on a bedside table, a desk, or in a living room, this lamp brings both beauty and functionality to your home. Embrace the perfect blend of style and convenience with Marrla.
